title: Understand and document a codebase
instruction: Explore the codebase in src/ and understand its structure. The tests in test_understanding.py will verify your understanding. You need to: (1) Understand the configuration system in config.py, (2) Understand the database module in database.py, (3) Understand the cache module in cache.py, (4) Create an __init__.py file in src/ to make it a proper package. The tests import from src.config, src.database, and src.cache - make sure these imports work.
difficulty_rationale: Requires tracing configuration, database, and cache modules before making a packaging change.
